title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Godrej Properties

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Godrej Properties
jsonLd.description:
We at Godrej Properties are looking for an experienced Real Estate Agent based out of Agra. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Godrej Properties:
Godrej Properties is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Godrej Properties!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
